name: plugin lifecycle: /uninstall-cleanup NEVER auto-deletes compliance/evidence/ or compliance/audit-checkpoints/ (operator-only with explicit --i-know-what-im-doing)
command: mkdir -p compliance/evidence compliance/audit-checkpoints && touch compliance/evidence/keep.txt compliance/audit-checkpoints/0001.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/uninstall-cleanup.sh" --category all --confirm yes && [ -f compliance/evidence/keep.txt ] && [ -f compliance/audit-checkpoints/0001.json ] && echo ok 1>&2
